title: Constituency Surgery Information - Michael Wheeler
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
text_excerpt: Constituency Surgery Information - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu Constituency Surgery Information I hold regular in-person constituency surgeries to speak with residents about the issues that matter to them. These usually take place on Friday afternoons on a monthly basis at rotating locations across Swinton, Eccles, Astley, and Irlam, although the day and time can occasionally change. Appointments are 30 minutes long, and the exact locations are confirmed during the week of the appointment for security reasons. At the moment, there is a 1–2 month wait for face-to-face appointments due to high demand. However, in many cases, I am able to offer help or advice sooner. If your matter is urgent, or if you would like assistance before a meeting becomes available, a member of my Casework Team would be happy to speak with you and see how we can help. To request a surgery appointment or support, please email michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk or call 0161 768 4134. When you get in touch, please include your full name, address, and postcode, so we can confirm you live in the constituency and respond promptly. Please note that MPs can only take up cases on behalf of their own constituents. You can check whether you live in my constituency by clicking here and entering your postcode.
